title: Pikiran Berlari di Jalur Malam
theme: Menjelajahi kecemasan yang muncul saat seseorang berusaha lari dari pikiran sendiri, menemukan bahwa menghadapinya adalah satu-satunya jalan keluar.

cover.prompt: A tranquil suburban running pathway at the onset of evening. City lights gently fade, transforming into a soft, comforting orange radiance that beautifully outlines distant trees and utility poles in strong, peaceful silhouettes. The wide, open pathway invites a sense of quiet solitude and personal escape. Cinematic composition, rule of thirds, environmental focus, subtle depth of field.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading, strong silhouettes

meta.plan_summary: A young worker attempts to escape daily stress by night jogging, but encounters a growing sense of paranoia and unease that blurs the line between reality and imagination. The story explores the protagonist's struggle with internal anxiety, culminating in a confrontation with their mental state and a new understanding of self.
